events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Richard Starkey, known as Ringo Starr, the iconic drummer for The Beatles, turns 86.

angles.name: Ringo's Birthday
angles.copy: Peace and love to the legendary Ringo Starr, who celebrates his 86th birthday this Tuesday! What's your favourite Ringo moment, on or off the drums?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! From stadium-rocking guitar solos to his work in astrophysics, what an absolute legend.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, turns 83.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young! Wishing a very happy birthday to the incomparable Sir Mick Jagger – still got the moves like Jagger!

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: MTV launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember when music television changed everything? 45 years ago, MTV launched with The Buggles' iconic track. Did video *really* kill the radio star?

events.title: Oasis 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. What's your top track from that absolute Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. What an era!

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: August 16th marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Elvis Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Remembering the King today. It's 49 years since Elvis Presley left us, but his music and legacy live on louder than ever.

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: September 13th marks 30 years since the tragic death of hip-hop legend Tupac Shakur.

angles.name: Tupac Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty years since we lost a true icon. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his incredible impact on music and culture.

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: September 18th marks 56 years since the passing of guitar visionary Jimi Hendrix.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who left us 56 years ago today. His guitar mastery remains unmatched.

events.title: The Beatles 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That zebra crossing photo is still one of the most famous album covers ever!

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, lead singer of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking as hard as ever with The Pretenders.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the distinctive voice of Oasis and a successful solo artist, turns 54.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Our Kid turns 54! Wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Still got that swagger.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' album turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's seminal album 'Imagine' was released in the UK on October 8, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Album Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A timeless message and a truly iconic album.

events.title: First iPod unveiled 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, Apple put '1,000 songs in your pocket' with the launch of the original iPod. Remember your first one?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated globally as James Bond Day, marking the premiere of 'Dr. No' in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years since 007 first hit the big screen. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the best theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon, co-founder of The Beatles and an iconic solo artist, would have been 86 today.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the legendary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire.
